name: Double Chocolate Dream Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, beat the margarine until creamy. Gradually add the brown sugar and white sugar, beating well after each addition.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each egg is incorporated. Blend in the vanilla extract.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture, stirring continuously.
5. Stir in the chocolate chips.
6. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake at 375°F for 8-10 minutes.
8. Let stand on the baking sheet for 2 minutes before removing the cookies.
